note: Voyage events triggered randomly during sailing. portrait_id references assets/portraits/. icon_id references assets/items/.

events.title: Pirates Ahead!
events.description: A black-flagged ship cuts across your bow. The captain demands tribute or blood.

options.label: Pay 100g tribute
options.info: Pirates take the gold and leave.

options.label: Fight them (-10 durability)
options.info: Hard-won victory. You loot their hold.

options.label: Outrun (need tailwind)
options.info: You sail hard and slip away.

events.title: Sudden Storm
events.description: Black clouds boil from the west. Lightning splits the sky. Your crew calls for orders.

options.label: Sail through (-15 dura)
options.info: The hull groans but you push through.

options.label: Lower sails and ride it out
options.info: You drift safely but lose time.

events.title: Wandering Merchant
events.description: An old trader hails your ship. 'I've a fine cargo at a fair price, captain.'

options.label: Buy Spice for 80g
options.info: A bargain — you'll triple it at port.

options.label: Buy Silk for 150g
options.info: Fine cloth. Worth its weight in Lisbon.

events.title: Land Ho!
events.description: Your lookout cries out. A green island appears, not on any chart.

options.label: Send ashore (chance of treasure)
options.info: You find a shipwreck. 150 gold in the chest.

events.title: Old Scholar
events.description: A bearded scholar from Padua asks passage. 'I'll share my charts in return.'

options.label: Accept (free)
options.info: His charts hint at trade routes you hadn't seen.

events.title: Noble Plea
events.description: A noble's barge bobs in your path. 'Sir captain — my daughter is held in Tunis. 500 gold if you free her.'

options.label: Accept the quest
options.info: (In a fuller game, this would trigger a rescue mission.)

options.label: Decline
options.info: He prays you change your mind.

events.title: Becalmed
events.description: The wind dies. Your sails hang limp under the noon sun.

options.label: Row (-5 dura)
options.info: Hard work but you make slow progress.

events.title: Fair Winds
events.description: A clean tailwind fills your sails. The crew sings.
